topPlaces.name: Sonamura
topPlaces.description: Sonamura is a town and a Nagar Panchayat in the Indian state of Tripura. It is the headquarter of Sonamura Subdivision in Sipahijala district and lies on the border with Bangladesh to the east of Comilla.

topPlaces.name: Melaghar
topPlaces.description: Melaghar is a small town located in the Indian state of Tripura and a Municipal Council in Sipahijala district, situated about 50 km (approx. 30 miles) from the capital Agartala.

topPlaces.name: Bhutua
topPlaces.description: kamalpur Comilla Adarsha Sadar Upazila of Comilla District, Bangladesh.

topPlaces.name: Melaghar Block
topPlaces.description: Melaghar block is a developing block in Sepahijala district in the Indian state of Tripura, located about 50 km from the capital Agartala.

topPlaces.name: Rudrasagar Lake
topPlaces.description: Rudrasagar Lake, also known as Twijilikma, is a lake located in Melaghar, Tripura, India. The Government of India's Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change has identified Rudrasagar as one of the wetlands of National Importance for conservation and sustainable use based on its bio-diversity and socio economic importance.

topPlaces.name: Chowara
topPlaces.description: Chowara is a village in Ernakulam District, Kerala, situated about 5 km North of Aluva Town

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharaja Bir Bikram Airport, Agartala (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sonamura, Melaghar, Bhutua, Melaghar Block, Rudrasagar Lake.
